ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "default_value_api" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter in API format */,
  "default_value_ui" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter in UI format */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module to which the parameter belongs */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is required */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the parameter was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of allowed values for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the module */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter to which the value belongs */,
  "value_api" TEXT /* Value in API format */,
  "value_ui" TEXT /* Value in UI format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this value is the default value for the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the value was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the value */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the session is active */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Serialized session data (e.g., user preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_sets" (
  "config_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration set */,
  "config_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration set was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration set was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration set is active */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment to which the configuration set belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_set_parameters" (
  "cs_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration set parameter */,
  "config_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration set */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value for the parameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is active in this configuration set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration set parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration set parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration set parameter */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration set parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cs_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_set_parameters_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES parameter_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_set_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_set_parameters_config_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_set_id") REFERENCES configuration_sets ("config_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "env_description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the environment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_config_sets" (
  "env_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment configuration set */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "config_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration set is active in this environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment configuration set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment configuration set was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the environment configuration set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment configuration set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_config_sets_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_config_sets_config_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_set_id") REFERENCES configuration_sets ("config_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter that was changed */,
  "old_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new value of the parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_old_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_value_id") REFERENCES parameter_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_new_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_value_id") REFERENCES parameter_values ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the integration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_config_sets" (
  "int_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration configuration set */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration */,
  "config_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration set is active in this integration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the integration configuration set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration configuration set was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the integration configuration set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration configuration set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("int_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_config_sets_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_config_sets_config_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_set_id") REFERENCES configuration_sets ("config_set_id")
)
